name: Unbelievable Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter a cookie sheet.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
3. Beat together the butter, sugar, egg, orange zest, and almond extract with your fingers until the mixture is combined.
4. Press the oatmeal into the butter mixture until the dough just holds together.
5. Form the dough into small balls using the tines of a fork.
6. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Yield: 2 1/2 dozen
